reports.description: Considerable flooding was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Nawałnica nad Starachowicami. Krajobraz po potężnej burzy. Zalane ulice, uszkodzone dachy, połamane drzewa. Zobacz zdjęcia", Starachowice Naszemiasto, 02 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Damaged roofs were reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
references: "Nawałnica nad Starachowicami. Krajobraz po potężnej burzy. Zalane ulice, uszkodzone dachy, połamane drzewa. Zobacz zdjęcia", Starachowice Naszemiasto, 02 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Automatic IMGW-PIB weather station (250200110) recorded a rain amount of 36,8 mm in 30 minutes.
references: Hydro IMGW-PIB, date of access: 01 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Automatic IMGW-PIB weather station (250200040) recorded a rain amount of 53,9 mm in 20 minutes, including 38,8 mm in 10 minutes.
references: Hydro IMGW-PIB, date of access: 01 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Automatic IMGW-PIB weather station (250200380) recorded a rain amount of 39,9 mm in 30 minutes.
references: Hydro IMGW-PIB, date of access: 01 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Local flash flood was reported after the passage of a thunderstorm. The time was based on radar data.
references: ""Wody było po kolana". Trwa sprzątanie po nawałnicy w gminie Baborów", Radio Opole, 02 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Automatic IMGW-PIB weather station (250210080) recorded a rain amount of 25,1 mm in 30 minutes.
references: Hydro IMGW-PIB, date of access: 01 JUL 2026.

reports.description: Very large hail up to at least 6 cm i.d. was reported. The time was based on radar data.
references: Eyewitness report via Sieć Obserwatorów Burz (Monitor Burz), 01 JUL 2026.
